KXCPI-26MAY-T0.4.reason: May 2026 MoM CPI likely in 0.2-0.4% range given disinflation trend through 2025-2026; >0.4% possible but market slightly overpriced at 79c.

KXCPI-26MAY-T0.5.reason: Readings above 0.5% MoM would require energy or shelter reacceleration; market at 34c appears slightly elevated vs base trend of ~0.25% monthly.

KXCPI-26MAY-T0.6.reason: >0.6% MoM would be a significant upside surprise; slightly higher than Kalshi at 7c given tail risk from energy price volatility.

KXCPI-26MAY-T0.7.reason: >0.7% MoM would be historically rare outside pandemic-era spikes; marginal upward edge over Kalshi's 2c given fat-tail uncertainty.

KXCPI-26MAY-T0.8.reason: >0.8% MoM virtually impossible absent a major external shock; fair at Kalshi's 2c floor.
